title: Security
description: Adds security features to protect your buildings, valuables, and yourself from threats.
body:
Adds security features to protect your buildings, valuables, and yourself from threats. 

Check the wiki to see everything this mod includes: [wiki](https://github.com/kilhaden/SecurityMod/wiki).

## Keypad
![Keypad Door](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/kilhaden/SecurityMod/resources/demos/keypad_door.gif)


The Keypad is used by right-clicking it, and introducing a numerical passcode. 
Once the keycode is set, right-clicking the keypad will allow you to enter the code. 
If it's correct, the keypad will emit redstone power for 3 seconds (Can be set with the config `keypadBlockAutolockTime`)


![Keypad Redstone](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/kilhaden/SecurityMod/resources/demos/keypad_redstone.gif)


## Block Reinforcer / Block Remover
Use the Block Reinforcer to secure your house making your block indestructible.
Once a block is reinforced only the owner with a block remover can remove it.

![Block Reinforcer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/kilhaden/SecurityMod/resources/demos/reinforcer.gif)


## Mines
The Mine explodes when stepped on or interacted with. Can be disguised as other blocks.

### Mine
![Mine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/kilhaden/SecurityMod/resources/demos/mine.gif)

### Stone Mine
![Stone Mine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/kilhaden/SecurityMod/resources/demos/stone_mine.gif)

### Dirt Mine
![Stone Mine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/kilhaden/SecurityMod/resources/demos/dirt_mine.gif)

### Furnace Mine
![Furnace Mine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/kilhaden/SecurityMod/resources/demos/furnace_mine.gif)

The furnace mine will also explode when you interact with it.
![Furnace Mine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wiki/kilhaden/SecurityMod/resources/demos/furnace_mine2.gif)

## Support and Feedback

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/kilhaden/SecurityMod/issues). Any feedback or suggestions are greatly appreciated.

You can also check out the project [wiki](https://github.com/kilhaden/SecurityMod/wiki).
